content.text:
{
  "dimension": "intervention-quality",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach consistently chooses moves that match the live read and times them well. Turn 2 acknowledges the rush without buying the dichotomy and opens with a real question. Turn 6 ('You're defending it pretty hard to me, and I'm not the one who said it') is a clean 'i-dont-buy-your-story' move at the right moment — right after the client's 'presence is a luxury' defense. Turn 8 catches the micro-moment of the client turning away from his own insight, which is precisely the AoA move. Turn 10 is the strongest sequence: the coach refuses to evangelize, refuses to give a technique, names why ('not because I'm withholding'), and returns to the pause — meeting resistance with okay rather than arguing the dichotomy or selling the work. Turn 12 follows the opening the client himself created ('the last few months especially') with a simple inviting question rather than racing to interpretation. Sequence integrity is intact: the coach is not pushing toward feeling or action before the client is regulated/curious, and is letting each move land with appropriate silence (the client's pauses are real).",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 6, 8, 10, 12],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Acknowledges the pressure as real without arguing the dichotomy; opens with a question that gets under the presenting frame."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Stays with what the co-founder said rather than pivoting to advice; appropriate pacing."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Clean 'i-dont-buy-your-story' move — reflects the defending energy back without lecturing. Well-timed after the 'presence is a luxury' line."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Notices the micro-turn-away and names it precisely; matches read to move."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Strongest move of the session: refuses to give a technique, explains the refusal without selling the work, returns to the live thread. Meets resistance with okay."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Follows the opening the client created ('last few months especially') with a simple inviting question rather than interpreting."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["the-rush-signature", "meet-resistance-with-okay", "i-dont-buy-your-story"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["what-are-you-defending", "feel-your-way-to-freedom"],
  "notes": "Coach did not offer a concrete frame for 'the work is the how' (e.g., subway-kid example) as the golden path suggests, but the restraint and refusal-to-evangelize is itself strong; the absence of that frame is a minor gap, not a miss in move quality."
}
